title: Safety Alert Triggered Event
description: Emitted when a safety alert is triggered in the safety system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

alert_id.description: Unique identifier of the safety alert.

alert_type.description: Type of safety alert (e.g., standard_violation, inspection_failure, certification_expiry, risk_threshold).

severity.description: Severity level of the safety alert.

description.description: Human-readable description of the safety alert.

triggered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the alert condition was detected.

source_ref.description: Reference to the source entity that triggered the alert (e.g., inspection_id, standard_id, project_id).

source_type.description: Type of source entity (e.g., inspection, standard, project, certificate).

assigned_to.description: Identifier of the user or team assigned to respond to this alert.

acknowledged.description: Whether the alert has been acknowledged.
